faqs.question: What causes drain fly infestations in Carteret homes?
faqs.answer: Drain flies breed in the organic buildup inside drains, pipes, and areas with standing water. Carteret's older homes and humid climate create ideal breeding conditions. Our treatment includes thorough drain cleaning, bio-enzyme applications, and identifying all breeding sites to eliminate the infestation at its source.
